title: amyema wichmannii subsp. purum
intro: Amyema wichmannii subsp. purum, also known as the Mistletoe of the rainforest, is a hemiparasitic plant native to the tropical rainforests of Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amyema wichmannii subsp. purum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments from respiratory issues to skin conditions.
